messages.task.failed.en_US: The system is busy, please try again later

messages.context_window_exceeded.zh_CN: 当前对话上下文已过长，请点击输入框右侧的上下文占比圆环，在弹出的面板中选择“压缩上下文”后再继续。
messages.context_window_exceeded.en_US: The conversation context is too long. Click the context usage ring on the right side of the input box, choose "Compact Context" from the panel, and then continue.

messages.agent_suspended.zh_CN: 当前任务已暂停，请稍后再试。
messages.agent_suspended.en_US: The current task has been suspended. Please try again later.

messages.insufficient_points.zh_CN: 当前可用积分不足，请稍后再试。
messages.insufficient_points.en_US: There are not enough available points right now. Please try again later.

messages.consumption_rounds_limit_exceed.zh_CN: 当前任务的单次轮数已达到上限，请稍后再试。
messages.consumption_rounds_limit_exceed.en_US: This task has reached the per-run round limit. Please try again later.

messages.task_concurrency_limit_exceeded.zh_CN: 当前并发任务数已达到上限，请稍后再试。
messages.task_concurrency_limit_exceeded.en_US: The concurrent task limit has been reached. Please try again later.

messages.session_restore_failed.zh_CN: 恢复会话状态失败，请重新发送消息。
messages.session_restore_failed.en_US: Failed to restore the session state. Please send the message again.

messages.agent_not_initialized.zh_CN: 智能体尚未初始化，请先初始化工作区后再试。
messages.agent_not_initialized.en_US: The agent has not been initialized yet. Please initialize the workspace first.

messages.internal_dispatch_failed.zh_CN: 当前请求处理失败，请联系管理员。
messages.internal_dispatch_failed.en_US: Failed to dispatch the request internally. Please contact the administrator.

messages.message_processing_failed.zh_CN: 任务执行异常，请稍后再试。
messages.message_processing_failed.en_US: Task execution failed. Please try again later.

messages.llm_provider_timeout.zh_CN: AI 模型服务当前负载较高，响应已超时，请稍后重试。
messages.llm_provider_timeout.en_US: The AI model service is under high load and timed out. Please try again later.

messages.llm_provider_connection_failed.zh_CN: AI 模型服务当前负载较高，连接暂时中断，请稍后重试。
messages.llm_provider_connection_failed.en_US: The AI model service is under high load and the connection was interrupted. Please try again later.

messages.llm_provider_rate_limited.zh_CN: 当前使用人数过多，AI 模型服务负载较高，请稍后重试。
messages.llm_provider_rate_limited.en_US: The AI model service is at capacity due to high user demand. Please try again later.

messages.llm_provider_error.zh_CN: AI 模型服务当前负载较高，处理请求时出现异常，请稍后重试。
messages.llm_provider_error.en_US: The AI model service encountered an error while processing your request. Please try again later.

agent_profile.desc_with_role.en_US: Your name is {name}, you are a {role}. {description}

cron.notify.intro.zh_CN: 以下定时任务刚刚完成。请保持你当前的人设和说话风格，直接通知用户。根据任务内容（job_body 字段）组织语言，可以带点关怀或实用提示，让回复自然、有温度。不要讨论调度机制、执行细节，或 AI 能做什么不能做什么。
cron.notify.intro.en_US: The following scheduled task(s) have just completed. Stay in your current persona and speaking style, and notify the user directly. Shape your reply around the task content (the job_body field); feel free to add a touch of care or a helpful nudge. Do NOT discuss scheduling mechanics, execution details, or what AI can or cannot do.
